task: A direct follow-up to the Creator V2 rebuild once the actual wireframe board became viewable in full detail. Frame Variations now render as colour swatch tiles (js/workspaceBuilder.js's new _buildSwatchRow, reusing Frame Look's own .icon-row/.icon-card classes) instead of a plain dropdown, matching the wireframe's FRAME SELECTED panel. Found and fixed a real, pre-existing Object Strip bug: every card was silently crushed to 40px tall by this codebase's own global button{height:40px} and button:not(...){width:100%} reset rules, since .object-card (a <button>) never overrode them -- the same class of bug the Creator UI Convergence Sprint already fixed once for the Publish Studio close button, fixed the same proven way (explicit !important overrides). Also added the pencil-icon overlay the wireframe shows on every editable object's thumbnail. See CLAUDE.md's Creator V2 — Wireframe Precision Pass entry for the full account.
